name: ardupilot-mavlink-udp
description: Run RTLS Link indoor drone checks over ArduPilot MAVLink UDP.

interface.shortDescription: Check RTLS Link drone hardware through ArduPilot MAVLink over UDP.
interface.longDescription: Provides the repeatable local workflow for discovering RTLS Link tags, OTA flashing, checking MAVLink heartbeat/log availability, smoke-testing MAVFTP, collecting UART bridge diagnostics, downloading missions, and validating ArduPilot DataFlash logs.
defaultPrompt: Use ardupilot_mavlink_udp to work with the drone over MAVLink UDP:
